Meet your artist

Boujie is a
state of glow

Hi, I’m Samantha — the hands and heart behind Bronzed & Boujie. I custom-blend every single solution to your skin tone and the exact glow you want: opalescent shimmer or deep, sun-kissed bronze. Never streaky. Never orange.

Stay home and I’ll bring the whole boujie setup to you, or come glow up at The Boujie Studio in St. Pete. Want extra sparkle? Ask about my signature Fairy Hair tinsel. Let’s get you glowing. ✨

Why Bronzed & Boujie

Say goodbye to orange

What we do

Luxury custom spray tanning designed to give you a flawless, natural-looking glow. Every tan is personalized to your skin tone and desired level of bronze using premium solutions, expert techniques, and finishing touches that leave you feeling confident, radiant, and boujie.

Why choose us

Say goodbye to orange, streaky tans and hello to your perfect glow. Bronzed & Boujie specializes in luxury custom spray tans that enhance your natural beauty with a radiant, confidence-boosting finish. From everyday glow-ups to weddings and special events — we bring the bronze to you.

the glow club

Boujie Babe Membership

For the babe who stays golden year-round. Monthly custom rapid tans plus a free scent additive every visit — available in-studio or mobile across the Bay.
